title: Resizable images, resizable text, and rotation via Free Transform tool

requirements.summary: Add resize capability for uploaded images on the attack path canvas with 8 drag handles
acceptanceCriteria: Selecting an uploaded image on the canvas shows 8 resize handles around it.
Dragging a corner or edge handle resizes the image element.
The image visually updates during the drag operation.
Resize state is persisted as part of the diagram element (width/height).

file_operations.description: Extend the Image interface to include width and height fields if not already present. Ensure these dimensions are tracked in state and included in the undo/redo history. Update any helper functions that create or modify Image elements to preserve these dimensions.

Implement image resize logic. When an Image element is selected, render 8 resize handles (4 corners + 4 edge midpoints) around the image bounding box. Add mouse event handlers that detect drag operations on these handles and update the Image width/height in real time via the useAttackPathState hook. Support Shift-key constraint for aspect ratio preservation during corner drags. Ensure resize operations are recorded in the undo/redo history.

requirements.summary: Add resize capability for text elements on the attack path canvas with 8 drag handles
acceptanceCriteria: Selecting a text element on the canvas shows 8 resize handles around the text box.
Dragging a handle resizes the text box in real time.
Text wraps within the new dimensions of the text box.
Width and height are stored on the TextLabel element in useAttackPathState.

file_operations.description: Extend the TextLabel interface to include width and height fields. Ensure these dimensions are tracked in state and included in the undo/redo history. Update any helper functions that create or modify TextLabel elements to preserve these dimensions.

Implement text element resize logic. When a TextLabel element is selected, render 8 resize handles (4 corners + 4 edge midpoints) around the text bounding box. Add mouse event handlers that detect drag operations on these handles and update the TextLabel width/height in real time via the useAttackPathState hook. Ensure the rendered text wraps within the resized box dimensions (using SVG foreignObject or div with overflow handling). Ensure resize operations are recorded in the undo/redo history.

requirements.summary: Add rotation capability for text and image elements via the Free Transform tool
acceptanceCriteria: With the Free Transform tool active, selecting a text or image element shows a rotation handle.
Dragging the rotation handle rotates the element around its center in real time.
Rotation angle is stored on the element in useAttackPathState (TextLabel and Image types).
The rotated transform is correctly applied via CSS transform or SVG transform attribute.
Rotation is preserved when the diagram is saved and reloaded.

file_operations.description: Extend both the TextLabel and Image interfaces to include a rotation field (in degrees, defaulting to 0). Ensure rotation angle is tracked in state and included in the undo/redo history. Update any helper functions that create or modify these elements to preserve the rotation value.

Implement rotation logic for the Free Transform tool. When the Free Transform tool is active and a TextLabel or Image element is selected, render a rotation handle (e.g., a small circle or icon) positioned above the element's bounding box. Add mouse event handlers that track drag movements on the rotation handle, calculate the rotation angle relative to the element's center, and update the element's rotation field in real time via the useAttackPathState hook. Apply the rotation using CSS transform: rotate() or SVG transform attribute. Ensure rotation operations are recorded in the undo/redo history and that rotated elements render correctly when the diagram is reloaded.
